subcodes.first_line: The missive which your eminence dispatched to this servant who circleth round the Throne was forwarded from the Great City unto Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب که بعبد طائف حول عرش ارسال داشتید از مدینه کبیر بین یدی فرستاد و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
